'''Lake Sah'ot''' was a small [[lake]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]], near [[Hanna City/Legends|Hanna City]].

==History==
The lake's crystal clear waters made it a popular vacation spot for many, including [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]], who had a [[dacha]] by the lake. [[Arhul Hextrophon/Legends|Arhul Hextrophon]] enjoyed the view while staying at the dacha as he recuperated from wounds inflicted by an [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] during the [[siege of Caprioril]].

{{Nature-stub}}
